name: Provolone-Ham Celery Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Provolone cheese, grated or shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix until well incorporated.
2. Spoon the mixture into celery stalks, filling them lightly.
3. This recipe yields enough stuffing for 15 to 20 individual servings of celery.
From: A Salute to Cheese, by Betty Wason, Hawthorn Books, Inc., 1966.
Shared by: June Hoffman, 7/93
